description: Best Cross Channel Option with A Car for the Brittany region of France.
solution: Brittany Ferries - Portsmouth to St Malo
reason: While you could opt for Plymouth to Roscoff to land directly in Brittany, we believe the Portsmouth to St Malo ferry is a better option as it is more accessible from across the UK and you can take the relaxing night ferry across the channel and land only one and a half hours away from the Brittany region.

description: Best Cross Channel Option with A Car for the Normandy region of France
reason: The Portsmouth to Caen ferry will drop you right into Normandy, while being one of the most accessible and comfortable options from the UK
